name: Midazolam
description: Benzodiazepine na-eme mkpụmkpụ na mmalite ngwa ngwa. Achọtara maka ịhịa aka n'ahụ, usoro ọgwụgwọ RSI, yana njikwa njide IM/IN. Ụzọ IM na intranasal na-enye uru dị ukwuu na ntọala ubi.
dose: Ịkwụsị: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV titrated. Usoro: 1-5 mg IV ngwa ngwa push. IM: 0.2 mg/kg. N'ime: 0.2 mg / kg (karịa 10 mg). Ọnọdụ epilepticus IM: 10 mg IM (okenye).
contraindications: Mmanya mmanya na-egbu egbu na mmebi obi
warnings: ịda mbà n'obi iku ume -- nyochaa ụzọ ikuku, nwee ihe ngbanwe (flumazenil) ma ọ bụrụ na ọ dị.
Ịgba ogwu IV ngwa ngwa na-ebute apnea -- jiri nwayọọ nwayọọ na-agbanye.

pediatric.dose: Ngwọta: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV. IM: 0.1-0.2 mg/kg. N'ime: 0.2-0.3 mg / kg. Njide IM: 0.2 mg/kg (kachasị 10 mg).
pediatric.note: N'ụzọ bara uru karịsịa na ụmụaka -- na-ezere ịnweta IV.

obstetric.note: Na-agafe placenta. Ịgbatị nwa ọhụrụ enwere ike. Jiri opekempe dị irè dose; nyochaa nwa ọhụrụ ma ọ bụrụ na enyere ya nso nnyefe.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Procedural Sedation Guidelines
